name: Kingenta Ecological Engineering Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Kingenta Ecological Engineering Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of fertilizers in China and internationally. Its products include compound, slow/controlled-release, water soluble, bio, and other fertilizers; and chelated micronutrients. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Linshu, China.
